Exercise 6

Preparation

Code 
library("readr")
library("sf")
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tmap)
library(terra)
library(lubridate)

wildschwein_BE <- read_delim("Data/wildschwein_BE_2056.csv") |> 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("E", "N"), crs = 2056, remove = FALSE)

st_crs(Feldaufnahmen_Fanel)
Coordinate Reference System:
  User input: CH1903+ / LV95 
  wkt:
PROJCRS["CH1903+ / LV95",
    BASEGEOGCRS["CH1903+",
        DATUM["CH1903+",
            ELLIPSOID["Bessel 1841",6377397.155,299.1528128,
                LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],
        PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,
            ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],
        ID["EPSG",4150]],

        METHOD["Hotine Oblique Mercator (variant B)",
            ID["EPSG",9815]],
        PARAMETER["Latitude of projection centre",46.9524055555556,
            ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],
            ID["EPSG",8811]],
        PARAMETER["Longitude of projection centre",7.43958333333333,
            ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],
            ID["EPSG",8812]],
        PARAMETER["Azimuth at projection centre",90,
            ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],
            ID["EPSG",8813]],
        PARAMETER["Angle from Rectified to Skew Grid",90,
            ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],
            ID["EPSG",8814]],
        PARAMETER["Scale factor at projection centre",1,
            SCALEUNIT["unity",1],
            ID["EPSG",8815]],
        PARAMETER["Easting at projection centre",2600000,
            LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],
            ID["EPSG",8816]],
        PARAMETER["Northing at projection centre",1200000,
            LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],
            ID["EPSG",8817]]],
    CS[Cartesian,2],
        AXIS["(E)",east,
            ORDER[1],
            LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],
        AXIS["(N)",north,
            ORDER[2],
            LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],
    USAGE[
        SCOPE["Cadastre, engineering survey, topographic mapping (large and medium scale)."],
        AREA["Liechtenstein; Switzerland."],
        BBOX[45.81,5.95,47.81,10.5]],
    ID["EPSG",2056]]
Code 
ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = Feldaufnahmen_Fanel, aes(fill = Frucht)) +
  theme_minimal()
Code 
tmap_options(basemap.server = 
               "SwissFederalGeoportal.NationalMapColor"  
               )

tmap_mode("view")

tm_shape(Feldaufnahmen_Fanel) + tm_polygons("Frucht")

The dataset Feldaufnahmen_Fanel was loaded as a simple feature object. It contains 975 features and three columns: FieldID, Frucht, and geom.

The column FieldID is numeric and identifies the field. The column Frucht is a character column and describes the crop or land-use type, for example Roggen, Wiese, Weide, or Wald. Some entries in this column contain missing values.

The geometry column geom stores the spatial information. The geometry type of the dataset is POLYGON, which means that the data represents areas rather than points or lines.

The coordinate reference system is CH1903+ / LV95, corresponding to EPSG:2056. This is a projected coordinate reference system used in Switzerland, with coordinates measured in metres.

Task 2

Code 
wildschwein_BE <- wildschwein_BE |> 
  filter(
    DatetimeUTC >= "2015-05-01 00:00:00",
    DatetimeUTC <= "2015-06-30 23:59:59"
  )


ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = Feldaufnahmen_Fanel, aes(fill = Frucht), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_sf(data = wildschwein_BE, size = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal()
Code 
wildschwein_BE_annotated <- st_join(
  wildschwein_BE,
  Feldaufnahmen_Fanel
)

glimpse(wildschwein_BE_annotated)
Rows: 15,563
Columns: 9
$ TierID      <chr> "002A", "002A", "002A", "002A", "002A", "002A", "002A", "0…

Code 
visited_fruits <- wildschwein_BE_annotated |> 
  count(Frucht, sort = TRUE)


wildschwein_eat_fruits <- wildschwein_BE_annotated |> 
  count(TierName, Frucht, sort = TRUE)

Task 3

Code 
library(lubridate)
library(forcats)

wildschwein_BE_annotated <- wildschwein_BE_annotated |>
  mutate(
    DatetimeUTC = ymd_hms(DatetimeUTC),
    hour = hour(DatetimeUTC),
    Frucht = if_else(is.na(Frucht), "No field / unknown", Frucht)
  )

crop_hour_counts <- wildschwein_BE_annotated |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  count(hour, Frucht, name = "n")


most_common_fruits <- wildschwein_BE_annotated |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  count(Frucht, sort = TRUE) |>
  slice_head(n = 5) |>
  pull(Frucht)

crop_hour_percent <- crop_hour_counts |>
  filter(Frucht %in% most_common_fruits) |>
  group_by(hour) |>
  mutate(percent = n / sum(n) * 100) |>
  ungroup()


ggplot(crop_hour_percent, aes(x = hour, y = percent, fill = Frucht)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:23) +
  labs(
    title = "Percentage of wild boar samples per crop type and hour",
    x = "Hour of day",
    y = "Percentage of samples",
    fill = "Crop / land-use type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
Code 
crop_hour_animal <- wildschwein_BE_annotated |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  filter(Frucht %in% most_common_fruits) |>
  count(TierName, hour, Frucht, name = "n") |>
  group_by(TierName, hour) |>
  mutate(percent = n / sum(n) * 100) |>
  ungroup()

ggplot(crop_hour_animal, aes(x = hour, y = percent, fill = Frucht)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  facet_wrap(~ TierName) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 23, by = 4)) +
  labs(
    title = "Crop use by hour and individual wild boar",
    x = "Hour of day",
    y = "Percentage of samples",
    fill = "Crop / land-use type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

  vegetationshoehe_LFI,
  terra::vect(wildschwein_BE)
)

wildschwein_BE_veg <- wildschwein_BE |>
  mutate(
    vegetationshoehe_LFI = vegetation_values[[2]]
  ) |>
  select(TierID, TierName, DatetimeUTC, vegetationshoehe_LFI, geometry)

    median_vegetation_height = median(vegetationshoehe_LFI, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_vegetation_height = min(vegetationshoehe_LFI, na.rm = TRUE),

wildschwein_BE_veg <- wildschwein_BE_veg |>
  mutate(
    DatetimeUTC = ymd_hms(DatetimeUTC),
    hour = hour(DatetimeUTC)
  )


ggplot(wildschwein_BE_veg, aes(x = hour, y = vegetationshoehe_LFI)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(group = hour)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:23) +
  labs(
    title = "Vegetation height at wild boar locations by hour",
    x = "Hour of day",
    y = "Vegetation height"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
Code 
ggplot(wildschwein_BE_veg, aes(x = TierName, y = vegetationshoehe_LFI)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Vegetation height at wild boar locations by individual",
    x = "Wild boar",
    y = "Vegetation height"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
